BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Personal budget stress test after rent increase and Greg child support shortfall.

CurrentState.Note: Based on October 2026 actuals. Revenue includes nursing salary and partial child support. Schema fields for business use retained at zero.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: If child support received in full at $650 per month
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $4,290. At full child support ($650 instead of $450), total income $5,250. Net = $960.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Moderate improvement. Buffer increases to $960 per month.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: If promoted to nurse manager with salary increase
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Significant improvement. Salary increase of approximately $800 per month provides strong buffer for debt paydown.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is approximately $4,290 per month at current expense levels. Current income provides a buffer of $760 that would increase significantly with full child support or a promotion.
ActionItems: Follow up on Greg child support shortfall
Prepare nurse manager application by October 20
Review Visa balance reduction plan after promotion decision
